since_last: 56% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.73%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.26% · BTC -0.48% · Gold -0.03% · Nasdaq100 +0.77%. 56% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.73%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.73%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.95%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at +6.43%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +6.43%, AMBA +5.39%, MRVL +4.60%, MU +4.02%, AMD +3.91%. Laggards: ADBE -3.76%, ORCL -3.46%, NOW -2.97%, UPST -2.85%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.96% at $121.56
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.96% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
